## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Flosum and GrowthX to explore GrowthX's content and SEO services for potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive content engine as a service, combining AI-powered workflows with expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Their approach focuses on organic growth through high-quality content creation, SEO optimization, and strategic link building](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed two main service packages: editorial content creation (50,000 words/month) and link building (10 links/month)](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Flosum expressed interest in an aggressive approach, potentially doubling content volume to 100,000 words/month](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Engine Overview

  - [Combines AI-powered workflows with expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Publishes \~20 million words/month across 50+ customers](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Team includes former leaders from TechCrunch, NerdWallet, TripAdvisor, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [12-week initial engagement: strategy refinement, content calibration, publishing, and rapid learning](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Utilizes AI for research, generating questions, and finding diverse sources](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Human experts synthesize information and ensure high-quality output](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Workflow includes SEO optimization, cross-linking, and technical audits](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Example shared: creating API-related pages for Float, improving existing content](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

### SEO and Link Building Strategy

  - [Focus on organic growth to reduce reliance on paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Link exchange program with other GrowthX customers (50+) to boost domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Additional link building through AI outbound campaigns and broker partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Regular technical SEO audits and site health checks included](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### Proposed Service Packages

1.  Editorial Content: 50,000 words/month, full-service content creation and optimization
2.  Link Building: 10 high-quality backlinks/month

<!-- end list -->

  - [Option to increase content volume to 100,000 words/month for more aggressive growth](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)

### Flosum's Current Situation

  - [Recent website redesign, some optimization still needed](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Low domain authority, making link building package attractive](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Interest in aggressive growth strategy, considering doubling content volume](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Girish to discuss internally with Brian and team about desired content volume (50k vs 100k words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Consider involving team member in India for execution support](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Flosum to make final decision on engagement and package selection](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Potential start date of April 21st if Flosum commits soon](https://fathom.video/share/p9yfsGKQt5LFUpAco-moNAMP4Hz7aqbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
